name: DuckDuckGo
philosophy: DuckDuckGo's web presence is privacy-search-with-personality chrome — DuckDuckGo Red-Orange (#de5833) as the brand voltage, the duck mascot Dax as the brand character, and a friendly humanist chrome that softens the privacy positioning. The atmosphere is approachable privacy: the brand wants to be the friendly alternative to Google, not the contrarian alternative to Brave.

design_language.motion_signature: Friendly micro-animations — Dax the duck mascot may wave or blink, hover lifts on cards (1.02 scale + 200ms). Search bar focus animates with a soft expand. The motion is friendly-confident.

trademark_signals: DuckDuckGo Red-Orange (#de5833) — chromatic voltage on CTAs and Dax accent
Dax the duck mascot — the friendly brand character
White canvas with soft rounded cards (8–16px)
Search-bar-as-hero — every page leads with the search input
Privacy-friendly tone — never contrarian, always approachable
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace Dax the duck with a generic icon — the mascot is brand voice
Don't tint DuckDuckGo Red-Orange — the specific saturated hex is brand
Don't sharpen card radii below 8px — friendly privacy is the brand
Don't drop the search-bar-as-hero on the home page
